en: Hey I've got the good life
Like the lips on a honey bee oh you taste so sweet
Nothing better than you and me how could it be
I must be doing something right to have ended up here with you I know there've
been a few bumps and a few hard nights but I'm thankful
With a little bit of love and a little bit of time the sun came shining through I've
got the good life I've got the good life
Hey I've got the good life
You never know what you mean to me you made my life complete
